    1. shouldForce(AltoClef, Task)

Interface ITaskCanForce

All Known Subinterfaces:
ITaskRequiresGrounded
All Known Implementing Classes:

public interface ITaskCanForce
Lets a task declare that it's parent can NOT interrupt itself, and that this task MUST keep executing.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    shouldForce(AltoClef mod, Task interruptingCandidate)
     

  • Method Details

    • shouldForce

      boolean shouldForce(AltoClef mod, Task interruptingCandidate)
      Parameters:
      interruptingCandidate - This task will try to interrupt our current task.
      Returns:
      Whether the task should forcefully keep going, even when the parent decides it shouldn't
